description: Create, update, or manage employees. Includes onboarding from contracts.
endpoints: POST /employee — body: {firstName, lastName, userType, department:{id}, email, dateOfBirth, phoneNumberMobile, nationalIdentityNumber}
PUT /employee/{id} — GET first for id+version, then PUT full object
common_errors: userType cannot be 0 or empty — always set to STANDARD, EXTENDED, or NO_ACCESS
PDF files may be empty (content_base64='') — extract data from prompt text instead
tips: CRITICAL ONBOARDING CHECKLIST — set ALL of these fields when the prompt mentions them: 1) firstName + lastName, 2) email, 3) departmentName or departmentId — if the department doesn't exist yet, pass departmentName and it will be created automatically. NEVER skip department assignment. 4) dateOfBirth (YYYY-MM-DD), 5) nationalIdentityNumber (11-digit personnummer), 6) userType (EXTENDED for admin), 7) startDate on employment, 8) percentageOfFullTimeEquivalent (e.g. 100.0), 9) annualSalary (årslønn), 10) occupationCode (STYRK code like '2511'), 11) hoursPerDay for standard work time (e.g. 7.5). If PDF is empty, use whatever data is in the prompt text. ADMIN ROLE = 50% of employee score — if prompt says 'administrator/admin/tilgang', ALWAYS set userType=EXTENDED. ALWAYS extract the department name from the prompt — look for words like 'avdeling', 'department', 'Abteilung', 'département', or specific department names (Salg, IT, HR, Regnskap, etc.).
